name: RunMan: Race Around the World
author: Poki
description: RunMan: Race Around the World is a platform game where you as the fastest runman in the world need to prove yourself by keep running! Simply run toward to end and overcome any obstacles that are in your way. Remember to build up momentum to run faster! Running is easy and fun! Let us enjoy running now! How to play RunMan: Race Around the World? Move Left - A or Left arrow key Move Right - D or Right arrow key Jump - W or Up arrow key Jump kick off a wall - W and Space bar or Up arrow key and space bar Hold the Space bar to zoom, smash blocks, and attack baddies! Who created RunMan: Race Around the World? RunMan: Race Around the World is created by Tom Sennett Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play RunMan: Race Around the World for free? You can play RunMan: Race Around the World for free on Poki. Can I play RunMan: Race Around the World on mobile devices and desktop? RunMan: Race Around the World can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
